title: Showing parent item in the sub-item task under 'My Work'
excerpt: Is there any way to show the parent item name on the ‘my work’ board that is relevant to the subitem? This is very frustrating as you can’t see which parent item it’s relevant to unless you open it. It should be visible …

posts.author: carlyn (carlyn)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to show the parent item name on the ‘my work’ board that is relevant to the subitem? This is very frustrating as you can’t see which parent item it’s relevant to unless you open it. It should be visible at a glance so you know what parent item it’s related to. Pointless if you have the same tasks for all parent items.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @carlyn ,

The ability to do this does not exist on Monday.com.

Here’s the link to a feature request asking for this functionality. If you follow this link you can vote and add a comment with your use case. The more votes this topic gets, the more likely it will be prioritized by the dev team. My Work Customization: Add ANY column to view, show parent Item name for Sub items
